title: Vigilance
contentHtml:
INTRODUCTION

Modern Coach Factory Vigilance Department is headed by Chief Vigilance Officer (CVO).

 VISION

(i) Continuously fight against corruption by advocating preventive vigilance, system improvement & spreading awareness about corruption. 

(ii) Ensure Integrity by being progressive, proactive and innovative.

The department assist the organisation in curbing corruption by way of carrying out regular checks and investigation into the complaints received from public or from its own employees.

 

Please take Integrity Pledge here:     Integrity Pledge                          e-Pledge
contentMarkdown:
**INTRODUCTION**

Modern Coach Factory Vigilance Department is headed by Chief Vigilance Officer (CVO).

 **VISION**

(i) Continuously fight against corruption by advocating preventive vigilance, system improvement & spreading awareness about corruption. 

(ii) Ensure Integrity by being progressive, proactive and innovative.

The department assist the organisation in curbing corruption by way of carrying out regular checks and investigation into the complaints received from public or from its own employees.

Please take Integrity Pledge here:     **[Integrity Pledge](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/uploads/INTEGRITY%20PLEDGE.pdf)                          [e-Pledge](https://pledge.cvc.nic.in/)**

![](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/uploads/Patrika.jpg)
